topics.title: Pete Townsend Interview Fallout
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout from Pete Townsend walking off a live broadcast after comments regarding his past legal issues were made by production staff.

topics.title: Prank Calls and Football Picks
topics.summary: The studio discusses prank calls involving Tommy Lee, reviews listener feedback on the "Bitter Half" segment, and updates the standings for a football betting pool.

topics.title: Radio Callers and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The show features a series of segments including a call from a listener in New Hampshire, an exchange with a caller named Alice, and a segment featuring guest Elliot Offen.

topics.title: Hostile Confrontation and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The show features a heated exchange involving threats of physical violence, the promotion of a website called gangstertalk.biz, and an interview with Sharon Osbourne regarding her appearance and past life.

topics.title: Sharon Osbourne Discusses Weight Loss and Career
topics.summary: The show features Sharon Osbourne discussing her weight loss journey, the removal of a medical band, her professional success in England, and personal details regarding her family and past relationships.

topics.title: Sharon Osbourne Interview and Comedy Roast
topics.summary: The show features an interview with Sharon Osbourne regarding her new book, followed by a comedy roast of producer Gary.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The show features a series of stand-up comedy sets, roast segments targeting various guests including Gary De La Batte and Lisa Lampinelli, and brief interactions with callers.

topics.title: Gary Delabate Roast
topics.summary: The show features a comedy roast of Gary Delabate involving various comedians and guests who trade insults and jokes.

topics.title: Comedy Roast of Cast Members
topics.summary: The studio features a series of insults and jokes directed at various guests and colleagues including Gary, Robin, Artie Lange, and Lisa Lampanelli.

topics.title: Comedy Roast of Gary Delabate
topics.summary: The show features a series of comedians performing insults and jokes during a roast for producer Gary Delabate.

topics.title: Comedy Roast of Sal and Richard
topics.summary: The studio features a series of insults and roasts directed at various guests including Sal, Richard, Artie, and Gary.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio hosts a comedy roast featuring various comedians including Lisa Lampanelli and Gary, followed by a discussion regarding the performance and audience interactions.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Media News
topics.summary: The studio reviews a recent comedy roast featuring various performers while discussing radio growth statistics, upcoming show previews, and news regarding international media coverage.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including Cat Stevens' controversial history, Black Sabbath's lineup rumors, Katie Couric's ratings, Madonna's adoption of a child in Malawi, and the genetics behind a pair of twins with different skin tones.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including listener reactions to celebrity news, the success of the Borat film, and various reports on current events.

topics.title: Health, News, and Entertainment Updates
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including health studies on diet and sperm quality, legal news regarding Heather Mills, reports on the popularity of Dancing with the Stars, updates on the Iraq War, and various entertainment stories involving celebrities and upcoming comedy shows.
